summary: Excellent audience recording with crystal‑clear balance, capturing a solid first set and an outstanding second set from the 1976 era.
review: The audience (aud) tape is praised as one of the clearest and most balanced recordings of the ’70s, offering full instrument separation while preserving the crowd ambience. Musically the concert delivers a well‑played first set and a particularly strong second set that ranks among the better shows of 1976. No significant flaws are noted.

ai_rating.rationale: The sole detailed review gives 5 stars, highlighting both superb recording quality and a strong performance, especially the second set; absence of negatives leads to a high rating but confidence is medium due to only one review.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, balanced sound with good instrument separation and ambient crowd that adds feel without interfering.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid first set followed by a particularly strong second set, making the concert one of the better 1976 shows.
